title: Find My Device - Screen with No Devices Connected
scenario: Find My Device screen shows "No devices were found" message and map when no Poly device is connected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with 'No Devices Connected' displayed.
2. Tap the hamburger menu icon (three horizontal lines) to open the side navigation menu.
3. Tap 'Find My Device' from the menu.
4. If prompted, grant location permission to the app.
5. Observe the Find My Device screen.
expected: The Find My Device screen displays a map, a warning sign, the message "No devices were found. Connect your Poly device using Bluetooth and try again.", and a "Not seeing your device?" button.
